name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out about a new-patient visit! Your consultation is on us. Any preferred day/time that works for you? And do you have dental insurance we should check, or not sure yet?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred appointment day/time AND indicated their insurance status (yes / no / unsure). No pressure — if they seem hesitant, reassure them the consult is free and painless before pushing for details.

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental 🪥
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're all set for {{preferred_start}} — we're so glad you reached out. Here's what to expect: a relaxed 45-minute new-patient consultation, a gentle look around, and plenty of time for your questions. No pressure, no surprises — just a friendly visit on us.

A few things that help first-timers feel at home:
• Arrive 5 minutes early so we can get you settled
• Bring your insurance card if you have one (totally fine if you don't)
• Let us know anything that's been on your mind about your smile

Need to reschedule? Just reply to this email or text us back — we'll take care of it, no fuss.

Can't wait to meet you,
The Bright Smile Dental team
